title: Teleport Rune
description: Create teleport runes and link them to locations to teleport back to.
body:
# Teleport Rune

This plugin allows you to craft teleport runes with stones and diamonds. Teleport runes can be activated by right clicking to save your current location, another right click with a rune will teleport you back to the saved location, consuming the rune.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WkhCHB-I8hI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Permissions
```
permissions:
  telerune.use:
    description: Allows you to use teleport runes.
    default: true
  telerune.craft:
    description: Allows you craft teleport runes.
    default: true
```

### Config
```
name: "Teleport Rune"
# Material as enum (for a list of possibilities see https://hub.spigotmc.org/javadocs/bukkit/org/bukkit/Material.html)
material: ENDER_EYE
# Cooldown in milliseconds
cooldown: 2000
recipe: >
  # | DIAMOND | # |
  # | ENDER_EYE | # |
  # | # | # |
url: "https://download.mc-packs.net/pack/87a561ac09fc3cd2b33b932807f33267037cfcf3.zip"
hash: "87a561ac09fc3cd2b33b932807f33267037cfcf3"
```

For questions and inquiries message me on [Discord](https://discord.gg/ARBvvg9YCu) or [Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/members/flomich.561186/)
